evidence.display: Pt is a 71 y/o man with PMH notable for PSC complicated by cirrhosis    with kno
evidence.text: Pt is a 71 y/o man with PMH notable for PSC complicated by cirrhosis    with known gastric varices who presented to the [**Location (un) 1415**] ED earlier this    evening with diarrhea and maroon stools after taking a laxative earlier    today.

evidence.display: He also reported vomiting "cranberry juice" earlier today as    well..
evidence.text: He also reported vomiting "cranberry juice" earlier today as    well..

evidence.display: Of note, recent EGD (last admission, done [**12-28**]) demonstrated    esophagea
evidence.text: Of note, recent EGD (last admission, done [**12-28**]) demonstrated    esophageal varices and amotility of the esophagus.    .

evidence.display: In the [**Location (un) 1415**] ED, vitals were HR 60, BP 70/40, RR 12.
evidence.text: In the [**Location (un) 1415**] ED, vitals were HR 60, BP 70/40, RR 12.
He received 4 L    NS.

evidence.display: He was found to have a hct down to 29.1 (35.1 on [**12-31**]).
evidence.text: He was found to have a hct down to 29.1 (35.1 on [**12-31**]).
His INR is    2.1.

evidence.display: He also had a potassium of 6 (not hemolyzed) which was treated    with calcium g
evidence.text: He also had a potassium of 6 (not hemolyzed) which was treated    with calcium gluconate, kayexalate.

evidence.display: He received 40 mg omeprazole IV X    1.
evidence.text: He received 40 mg omeprazole IV X    1.

evidence.display: He was transfused with 1 U PRBCs prior to transfer.
evidence.text: He was transfused with 1 U PRBCs prior to transfer.

evidence.text: Repeat BP prior    transfer not documented.

evidence.text: In the ambulance, the patient's blood pressure    is documented as 77/46 and then up to 160/133 (?).
His FSBS was 110.    .

evidence.display: On arrival to the ICU, the patient is without complaint.

evidence.text: He had a frankly melenotic stool on    arrival to the ICU and BPs down to the 70s.
